gauge.name: St. Regis River near St. Regis

impacts.statement: Flooding impacts much of the town of St. Regis especially those buildings closer to the confluence of the St. Regis and Clark Fork Rivers.
Flood affects many buildings and roads near the town of St. Regis.
Flooding affects low lying areas adjacent to the river. Minor flooding near the town of St. Regis and several roads in the area may also be flooded.
Some flooding occurrs at the I-90 freeway exit upstream of the town of St. Regis.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
